user.title: Bakery Setup
user.description: Do you want to install the baker's calculator on your server? If you have a physical temperature sensor in your kitchen, you can optionally add it below. This will allow you to dynamically choose between that sensor or a static manual temperature (ideal for simulating a constant proofing temperature). By default, manual control will be used.

data.usar_sensor_fisico: I have a physical temperature sensor in my kitchen/bakery

error.sensor_no_seleccionado: You must choose a physical temperature sensor from the list if you check the box.

abort.already_configured: The baker's calculator is already configured on your system.
